narrative:
Hicksville Village B (precinct in Defiance County) has 818 registered voters, with 66.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
